customization.description: Customize how absence events appear in external calendars.
customization.title: Event Customization

calendar.description: Configure calendar providers, ICS feeds, and sync settings for your organization

icsFeeds.description: Allow users to subscribe to absence calendars via ICS/iCal format.
icsFeeds.personalDesc: Employees can create read-only calendar subscriptions for their absences
icsFeeds.teamDesc: Team leads can create shared feeds showing all team absences
icsFeeds.title: ICS Feeds

integrations.description: Connected employee calendars that fall inside your current settings scope.
integrations.empty: No calendar integrations are available in your current scope yet.
integrations.title: Relevant Integrations

calendar.managerDescription: Review calendar integrations that affect your teams, areas, and managed projects.
calendar.noProvidersConfigured: No calendar providers are configured. Contact your system administrator to set up OAuth credentials.

providers.description: Enable or disable calendar sync for specific providers. Employees can connect their accounts when enabled.
providers.title: Calendar Providers

calendar.readOnlyManagerNotice: Managers can review calendar sync coverage for their teams, areas, and projects, but only organization admins can change these settings.

syncBehavior.autoSyncDesc: Automatically sync absences to connected calendars when approved
syncBehavior.conflictRequiredDesc: Require employees to check for calendar conflicts before submitting absences
syncBehavior.description: Configure how calendar sync works for your organization.
syncBehavior.title: Sync Behavior

calendar.title: Calendar Sync

credentials.description: Enter a Clockin customer API bearer token. The token is only used for this import session.
credentials.title: Clockin API Token

mapping.description: Match Clockin employees to existing Z8 employees. Automatic email matches are preselected.
mapping.title: Map Employees

preview.description: Review what Clockin data is available before mapping employees and scanning records.
preview.title: Clockin Preview

review.noProductionRecords: No production records have been imported yet.
review.scanningDescription: Review batch {reviewBatchId} is scanning. Review and approve records before commit.
review.startSuccess: Import review scan started. Review is required before records are committed.

selection.description: Choose which Clockin records to scan for review. Records must be reviewed before commit.
selection.title: Import Scope

complete.description: Review is required before Clockodo records are committed to production.

credentials.apiKeyHint: You can find your API key in your Clockodo profile:
credentials.description: Enter your Clockodo email and API key. You can find your API key in Clockodo under My Profile > API Key. Credentials are not stored.
credentials.title: Clockodo Credentials

importing.description: Please do not close this page. The review scan is being queued and may take a while for large datasets.
importing.title: Starting Review Scan…

preview.description: Here is a summary of the data found in your Clockodo account. Existing Z8 data is shown for comparison.
preview.title: Data Preview

review.startedToast: Import review scan started. Review is required before records are committed.

selection.dateRange: Date range for time entries & absences
selection.dateRangeDescription: This only affects time entries and absences. Other data (users, teams, etc.) is always scanned fully.
selection.description: Choose which data types to scan. Review is required before records are committed.
selection.emptyUserScope: Select at least one Clockodo user before starting the scan.
selection.incompleteCustomDateRange: Select both a start and end date before starting the scan.
selection.title: Select Data for Review

userMapping.description: Map Clockodo users to existing Z8 employees or choose to create new accounts. Users matched by email are auto-mapped.
userMapping.onlyMapped: Only scan mapped users (don't create new accounts for unmapped users)
userMapping.title: Map Users

discord.description: Configure Discord notifications for your organization
discord.title: Discord

slack.description: Configure Slack notifications for your organization
slack.title: Slack

teamsNotifications.description: Configure Microsoft Teams notifications for your organization
teamsNotifications.title: Microsoft Teams

bot.description: Connect a Telegram bot to enable notifications and commands for your organization.
bot.title: Telegram Bot

telegram.botTokenHelp: Create a bot with @BotFather on Telegram and paste the token here.
telegram.description: Configure Telegram bot integration for notifications and commands

disconnectConfirm.description: This will disable all Telegram notifications and commands for your organization. Employee account links will be preserved.
disconnectConfirm.title: Disconnect Telegram Bot?

features.approvalsDesc: Send approval requests and allow approve/reject via Telegram
features.description: Configure which features are enabled for the Telegram bot.
features.digestDesc: Send a daily summary of absences and schedules
features.escalationsDesc: Escalate unanswered approvals to the next manager
features.title: Features

linking.description: Link your Telegram account to receive personal notifications.
linking.instructions: Send this command to the bot on Telegram:
linking.title: Telegram Account

telegram.notConfigured: Telegram is not configured for this organization. Contact your administrator.
telegram.title: Telegram

unlinkConfirm.description: You will stop receiving Telegram notifications. You can link again later.
unlinkConfirm.title: Unlink Telegram Account?
